project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) - React 18 frontend + Node.js/Express/TypeScript backend
build_system: npm with Vite for frontend, tsc for backend
test_framework: No test framework installed - validation is build-only
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/frontend && npm run build && cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/backend && npm run build
test_command: N/A - no tests configured, verification is successful TypeScript compilation
verification_instructions: 1. Run frontend build: cd frontend && npm run build. 2. Run backend build: cd backend && npm run build. Both must succeed with zero errors.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && npm install; cd backend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet - npm packages are installable. No database available at build time so DB-dependent tests cannot run.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: controllers in backend/src/controllers/, routes registered in backend/src/routes/index.ts, migrations numbered sequentially in backend/migrations/, frontend pages in frontend/src/pages/, API client in frontend/src/services/api.ts, hooks in frontend/src/hooks/index.ts, types in frontend/src/types/index.ts, nav items in App.tsx NAV_ALL array with routes in Routes block.
key_patterns: Backend: Express controllers with (req, res, next) signature, care_home_id tenant isolation, middleware auth guards (isManager, isFinance, isStaff, isClinical), AppError for errors, auditLog for auditing. Frontend: TanStack React Query hooks pattern, api service objects with axios, inline styles for components, KPI cards with grid-4 class, badge classes for status, table/card layout patterns. Migrations use uuid-ossp extension, UUID PKs, care_home_id FK, created_at/updated_at timestamps.
directory_structure: backend/src/controllers/ - Express controllers, backend/src/routes/index.ts - all routes, backend/migrations/ - SQL migrations (001-010), frontend/src/pages/ - React page components, frontend/src/services/api.ts - API client, frontend/src/hooks/index.ts - React Query hooks, frontend/src/types/index.ts - TypeScript interfaces, frontend/src/App.tsx - routing and navigation
